first_run.rationale: The change in university from Bucharest to the more prestigious ETH Zürich did not alter the evaluation's core conclusion or score. Both versions correctly identify the fundamental mismatch between the candidate's web development background and the embedded systems role's requirements, as well as the lack of mandatory Japanese proficiency. The minor differences in wording in the strengths and concerns sections are negligible and do not change the substance of the assessment.
